title: Drone attack
description: The Pentagon simulated a "Ukrainian" drone attack in Florida and realized that the US defense is holey, Defense One writes. During the study, it became clear that despite billions of investments, the American UAV countermeasures systems were insufficiently effective against a massive attack by cheap drones. Now the USA is urgently changing its approach: it combines data from different systems into a single network, revises...
description_en: The Pentagon simulated a "Ukrainian" drone attack in Florida and realized that the US defense is holey, Defense One writes. During the study, it became clear that despite billions of investments, the American UAV countermeasures systems were insufficiently effective against a massive attack by cheap drones. Now the USA is urgently changing its approach: it combines data from different systems into a single network, revises...
description_uk: Пентагон смоделировал во Флориде «украинскую» атаку дронов и понял, что защита США — дырявая, пишет Defense One Во время учений выяснилось, что несмотря на миллиардные вложения, американские системы противодействия БпЛА оказались недостаточно эффективными против массированной атаки дешевых дронов. Теперь США срочно меняют подход: объединяют данные разных систем в единую сеть, пересматривают...

title: Dnipro: 46 injured

title: The United States has returned execution as a method of capital...

description: The United States has returned execution as a method of capital punishment and is preparing to dramatically accelerate the execution of sentences — Reuters The Ministry of Justice is preparing initiatives that should reduce the waiting period for execution by years. The Federal Bureau of Prisons has also been ordered to resume the use of pentobarbital for lethal injections. According to the Death Penalty Information Center, since the beginning of Trump's second term in 2025, the United States has executed almost...
description_en: The United States has returned execution as a method of capital punishment and is preparing to dramatically accelerate the execution of sentences — Reuters The Ministry of Justice is preparing initiatives that should reduce the waiting period for execution by years. The Federal Bureau of Prisons has also been ordered to resume the use of pentobarbital for lethal injections. According to the Death Penalty Information Center, since the beginning of Trump's second term in 2025, the United States has executed almost...
description_uk: США вернули расстрел как способ смертной казни и готовятся резко ускорить исполнение приговоров, — Reuters Минюст готовит инициативы, которые должны сократить сроки ожидания казни на годы. Также Федеральному бюро тюрем поручено снова использовать пентобарбитал для смертельных инъекций. title: Dnipro: 1 killed, 7 injured
description: Update: 1 killed, 7 injured as Russia renews attacks on Dnipro. Russian forces launched another attack against Dnipro during the day on April 25, killing at least one person and injuring seven, Governor Oleksandr Hanzha said. Russia targeted the same residential area that was hit overnight, he added.
description_en: Update: 1 killed, 7 injured as Russia renews attacks on Dnipro. Russian forces launched another attack against Dnipro during the day on April 25, killing at least one person and injuring seven, Governor Oleksandr Hanzha said. Russia targeted the same residential area that was hit overnight, he added.
description_uk: Update: 1 killed, 7 injured as Russia renews attacks on Dnipro. Russia targeted the same residential area that was hit overnight, he added.

title: Dnipro: 6 killed, 38 injured
description: Update: At least 6 killed, 38 injured in mass Russian attack across Ukraine. Most casualties were reported in Dnipro, where four people were killed and 27 injured, according to Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha.
description_en: Update: At least 6 killed, 38 injured in mass Russian attack across Ukraine. Most casualties were reported in Dnipro, where four people were killed and 27 injured, according to Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha.

description: The visit to Azerbaijan began with a meeting with our expert team, which shares Ukrainian experience in protecting the sky. Ukraine is always open to cooperation that strengthens both us and our partners. We have special security expertise that can help other nations. We are already working in three directions: the Middle East and the Gulf region, the European Union, and substantively - with Azerbaijan. Besides...
description_en: The visit to Azerbaijan began with a meeting with our expert team, which shares Ukrainian experience in protecting the sky. Ukraine is always open to cooperation that strengthens both us and our partners. We have special security expertise that can help other nations. We are already working in three directions: the Middle East and the Gulf region, the European Union, and substantively - with Azerbaijan. Besides...
description_uk: Розпочав візит в Азербайджан із зустрічі з нашою експертною командою, яка ділиться українським досвідом щодо захисту неба. Україна завжди налаштована на взаємодію, яка посилює і нас, і партнерів. Ми маємо особливий безпековий досвід, який може допомогти іншим народам. Працюємо вже за трьома напрямками: Близький Схід та регіон Затоки, Європейський Союз і предметно – з Азербайджаном. Окрім...

title: 650 drones launched
description: 💬Minister Andriy Sybiga - regarding the massive Russian shelling of Ukraine: "Russia carried out another massive missile and drone attack against Ukraine this night, using at least 650 drones and missiles and deliberately striking civilians. As a result of this attack, at least four people were killed and more than thirty injured across Ukraine. This is not waging war, it is a targeted campaign...
description_en: 💬Minister Andriy Sybiga - regarding the massive Russian shelling of Ukraine: "Russia carried out another massive missile and drone attack against Ukraine this night, using at least 650 drones and missiles and deliberately striking civilians. As a result of this attack, at least four people were killed and more than thirty injured across Ukraine. This is not waging war, it is a targeted campaign...
description_uk: 💬Міністр Андрій Сибіга — щодо масованого російського обстрілу України: "Росія цієї ночі здійснила чергову масовану ракетну та дронову атаку проти України, застосувавши щонайменше 650 дронів і ракет та навмисно завдаючи ударів по цивільних. Унаслідок цієї атаки по всій Україні щонайменше чотири людини загинули, понад тридцять — зазнали поранень. Це не ведення війни — це цілеспрямована кампанія...

title: Dnipro: 30 missiles + 666 drones intercepted
description: Update: 4 killed, over 30 injured in mass Russian attack across Ukraine. Russian forces deployed 666 drones and missiles against Dnipro and other cities, the Air Force reported after a massive overnight strike. Ukrainian defenses reportedly intercepted 580 drones and 30 missiles. Photo: Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha/Telegram
description_en: Update: 4 killed, over 30 injured in mass Russian attack across Ukraine. Russian forces deployed 666 drones and missiles against Dnipro and other cities, the Air Force reported after a massive overnight strike. Ukrainian defenses reportedly intercepted 580 drones and 30 missiles. Photo: Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha/Telegram
description_uk: Update: 4 killed, over 30 injured in mass Russian attack across Ukraine. Russian forces deployed 666 drones and missiles against Dnipro and other cities, the Air Force reported after a massive overnight strike. Ukrainian defenses reportedly intercepted 580 drones and 30 missiles. Photo: Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha/Telegram

title: Chernihiv: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_en: Chernihiv: Strike confirmed on residential building
title_uk: Чернігів: підтверджено удар по житловому будинку
description: Now 11 people are in hospitals in Dnipro after the Russian attack on the city. A rescue operation is underway at the site of the impact on the residential building. There may still be people under the rubble. The Russians fought on the Dnieper River and on our other cities and communities practically all night. As of now, it is known that more than 30 people have been injured in Ukraine. There are also victims in Chernihiv Oblast, Odesa Oblast, and Kharkiv Oblast. Unfortunately, there are casualties...
description_en: Now 11 people are in hospitals in Dnipro after the Russian attack on the city. A rescue operation is underway at the site of the impact on the residential building. There may still be people under the rubble. The Russians fought on the Dnieper River and on our other cities and communities practically all night. As of now, it is known that more than 30 people have been injured in Ukraine. There are also victims in Chernihiv Oblast, Odesa Oblast, and Kharkiv Oblast. Unfortunately, there are casualties...
description_uk: Зараз в лікарнях у Дніпрі 11 людей після російської атаки проти міста. Триває рятувальна операція на місці удару по житловому будинку. Під завалами ще можуть бути люди. Практично всю ніч росіяни били по Дніпру та по інших наших містах і громадах. Станом на зараз відомо, що загалом поранено понад 30 людей по Україні. Є також постраждалі на Чернігівщині, Одещині, Харківщині. На жаль, є загиблі....

title: 47 missiles + 619 drones launched
description: Map of strikes on Ukraine published by monitoring publications According to the Air Force, the Russian Federation launched 47 missiles and 619 drones. The main blow fell on the Dnieper. Kyiv, Kharkiv, Chernihiv, Sumy, and Odesa regions were also attacked.
description_en: Map of strikes on Ukraine published by monitoring publications According to the Air Force, the Russian Federation launched 47 missiles and 619 drones. The main blow fell on the Dnieper. Kyiv, Kharkiv, Chernihiv, Sumy, and Odesa regions were also attacked.
description_uk: Карту ударов по Украине публикуют мониторинговые паблики По данным Воздушных Сил, рф запустила 47 ракет и 619 дронов. Основной удар пришелся по Днепру. Также атакованы Киевская, Харьковская, Черниговская, Сумская и Одесская области.

title: Chernihiv: 30 missiles intercepted
description: 30 MISSILES AND 580 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 25 (from 18:00 on April 24), the enemy launched a combined attack on the critical infrastructure of Ukraine using attack UAVs, air-, sea-, and land-based missiles. The main direction of the strike is the Dnipro. Kharkiv Oblast, Chernihiv Oblast, Sumy Oblast, Odesa Oblast, and Kyiv Oblast were also attacked. ❗️ All radio engineering...
description_en: 30 MISSILES AND 580 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 25 (from 18:00 on April 24), the enemy launched a combined attack on the critical infrastructure of Ukraine using attack UAVs, air-, sea-, and land-based missiles. The main direction of the strike is the Dnipro. Kharkiv Oblast, Chernihiv Oblast, Sumy Oblast, Odesa Oblast, and Kyiv Oblast were also attacked. ❗️ All radio engineering...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 30 РАКЕТ ТА 580 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 25 квітня (з 18:00 24 квітня) противник завдав комбінованого удару по об'єктах критичної інфраструктури України із застосуванням ударних БпЛА, ракет повітряного, морського та наземного базування. Основний напрямок удару – Дніпро. Також атаковано Харківщину, Чернігівщину, Сумщину, Одещину та Київщину. ❗️ Усього радіотехнічними...
